reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use ImageBundle for the panel frame and render floor text plus timer digits with the bitmap font atlas.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_floor_timer_header_320x48.png through AssetServer during HUD setup and pair it with the bitmap font resource.
runtime_notes: Panel anchors to the top center of the 1920x1080 UI canvas.
Numeric text remains live and is not baked into the panel art.
Header width leaves enough room for FLOOR XX / 30 on one line and MM:SS.ss on the second line.

context.usage: Top center header for floor count and live elapsed time during each tower ascent attempt.

shape.silhouette: Wide stepped plaque with a title line, lower timer recess, and narrow side fins that echo the tower architecture.

specs.texture: Dark lacquer panel with thin gold edge striping and clean white text windows.
specs.shading: Flat dark center with a slightly brighter gold top edge.

acceptance_criteria: Top text recess is at least 280x16 px and lower timer recess is at least 220x16 px.
Side fins extend no more than 12 px beyond the main plaque to avoid crowding center stage action.
